input.premium_html: Morning — Day 4 of consolidation BTC holding $66.3K-$69.4K on declining volume. Market waiting. ETH — the one to watch. Funding creeping up while price drifts toward $1,880 liquidation cluster ($22M longs). Break triggers forced selling. SOL — relative strength, up 4.8% in 24h. Approaching $144 resistance. Setups ETH short below $1,880 → $1,820 (inv $1,950) — 72% SOL long above $144 → $152 (inv $138) — 55%
input.free_html: Morning Brief Day 4 range-bound. ETH approaching $1,880 liquidation cluster — key level today. SOL showing relative strength near $144.
